body.content:
{"title":"Daily AI Info","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"要闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Anthropic 与 SpaceX 合作新增 300MW 算力，放宽使用限制"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Anthropic 宣布与 SpaceX 达成合作，获得 Colossus 1 数据中心全部超过 300 兆瓦的算力。 基于此及近期其他算力交易， Anthropic 即日上调使用限额： Claude Code 的五小时滚动速率限制翻倍。 同时移除 Pro 与 Max 方案在高峰时段的限额缩减。 API 中 Opus 模型速率限制也得到大幅提升。 值得注意的是，每周总体限额并未提升。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/higher-limits-spacex","text":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/higher-limits-spacex"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"模型发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"豆包 Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite 模型升级支持全模态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
字节火山 宣布 Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite 完成重大升级，成为 豆包 首款全模态理解模型。该模型支持视、图、音、文统一理解与跨模态推理，Agent、Coding与GUI能力增强，可闭环执行界面操作。 其视觉在物理、医疗推理上超越前代pro版，部分领域达SOTA；音频支持19语种转写互译。 该模型已在 火山方舟 上线。此外， Doubao-Seed-2.0-mini 同步上线，同样支持全模态。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/nWOSnTKD07ORQGf54LQqKQ?scene=1&click_id=8","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/nWOSnTKD07ORQGf54LQqKQ?scene=1&click_id=8"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Zyphra发布ZAYA1-8B，AMD平台训练开源"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Zyphra 发布了总参数 8.4B 、活跃参数 760M 的 MoE 语言模型 ZAYA1-8B 。 该模型完全在 AMD 集群上训练，在数学与编程推理任务上击败了部分大型模型。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.zyphra.com/post/zaya1-8b","text":"https://www.zyphra.com/post/zaya1-8b"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Claude Managed Agents 上线 dreaming 与 outcomes 等功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Anthropic 为 Claude Managed Agents 推出预览版 dreaming 与测试版 outcomes 等功能。 其中， dreaming 可自动优化记忆实现 Agent 自我改进。 outcomes 可通过独立评分提升输出质量。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://claude.com/blog/new-in-claude-managed-agents","text":"https://claude.com/blog/new-in-claude-managed-agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Cursor 发布 3.3 版，新增上下文占用明细及 CI 自动修复"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Cursor 发布了 3.3 版本。开发者现在能直观查看上下文中 rules 、 skills 等内容的占用明细来优化配置。 该版本还能设置常驻 Agent 自动对 CI 失败提交修复。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/cursor_ai/status/2052059748544249918","text":"https://x.com/cursor_ai/status/2052059748544249918"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"TRAE 宣布三端同步全量免费开放"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
TRAE 宣布 SOLO 三端同步全量开放。 该产品支持通过移动端语音跨设备远程调度 Agent 任务，三端均可语音交互生成会议纪要。 桌面端与网页端新增 飞书 接入与定时任务功能。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://solo.trae.cn/","text":"https://solo.trae.cn/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenClaw 发布 2026.5.5 及 5.6，新增功能并修复问题"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenClaw 项目发布 2026.5.5 和 2026.5.6 两版更新。 2026.5.5 版修复了多平台频道与插件更新的稳定性问题。 2026.5.6 版则紧急修正了系列 Bug 与报错。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases","text":"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Warp 团队开源 oz-skills 集合，包含 15 个内部工作流技能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Warp 团队开源了包含 15 个组件的 Agent Skills 合集 oz-skills ，涵盖 Git 协作与 Web 审计等五大场景。 开发者可通过执行 npx 指令快速安装。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://github.com/warpdotdev/oz-skills","text":"https://github.com/warpdotdev/oz-skills"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"产品应用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌更新搜索中AI Mode与AI Overviews，优化链接展示与排序"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 更新了搜索中的 AI Mode 与 AI Overviews ，带来五项功能： AI 回答末尾提供延伸阅读建议；高亮展示用户订阅的新闻链接；引入社区观点预览；在正文旁直接嵌入相关链接；桌面端新增悬停链接预览。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/explore-web-generative-ai-search","text":"https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/explore-web-generative-ai-search"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Manus 升级 Projects 功能，支持从任务中自动学习复用模式"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Manus 为其 Projects 功能上线“从每个任务学习”能力。 该能力能自动识别任务中的可复用指令、文件与工作流。 经用户审查批准后，将更新项目上下文。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://manus.im/blog/manus-projects-self-updating","text":"https://manus.im/blog/manus-projects-self-updating"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"技术与洞察"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"11. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Unsloth AI 联合 NVIDIA 优化，大模型训练速度提升约 25%"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Unsloth AI 与 NVIDIA 联合发布技术指南，通过引入“打包序列元数据缓存”、“双缓冲检查点重载”以及" MoE 路由优化”三项技术，在 B200 显卡上将大语言模型训练速度提升约 25% 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://unsloth.ai/blog/nvidia-collab","text":"https://unsloth.ai/blog/nvidia-collab"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"12. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 联合英伟达等开源 MRC 网络协议服务 AI 训练"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 联合 AMD 、 英伟达 等公司，通过开放计算项目正式开源了一种名为 MRC 的新型网络协议。 这个协议专为大规模 AI 训练设计，能解决同步训练时 GPU 数据传输的拥塞和故障问题。目前已在 Stargate 等项目中部署。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/mrc-supercomputer-networking/","text":"https://openai.com/index/mrc-supercomputer-networking/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"13. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Fenris Creations 宣布独立并联手 DeepMind 启动 AI Agent 研究"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
运营 EVE Online 的 CCP Games 正式更名为 Fenris Creations ，并与 Google DeepMind 达成合作。 双方将把该游戏作为安全沙盒，在受控离线环境中探索 AI Agent 的记忆、持续学习与长期规划能力。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.eveonline.com/news/view/a-new-era","text":"https://www.eveonline.com/news/view/a-new-era"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"14. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌 Flow Music 联手 Believe，向艺人开放 AI 音乐生成工具"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布与 Believe 达成合作，向其旗下艺人提供 AI 音乐生成工具 Flow Music 。 在此合作中， 谷歌 不主张对生成内容拥有所有权。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-labs/believe-flow-music-partnership","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-labs/believe-flow-music-partnership"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"15. "},{"tag":"text","text":"WorldClaw 联合特朗普家族 WLFI 平台推出 WorldRouter"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
近日， WorldClaw 与 特朗普 家族创立的加密项目 WLFI 联合推出模型路由平台 WorldRouter 。 用户凭单账户可调用超 300 款 AI 模型。 目前，社区对该平台折扣真实性及相关机制存在诸多质疑。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://worldclaw.ai/","text":"https://worldclaw.ai/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"前瞻与传闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"16. "},{"tag":"text","text":"月之暗面传将获 20 亿美元融资，估值超 200 亿美元"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道， Kimi 即将完成 20 亿美元 新一轮融资。 投后估值突破 200 亿美元 ，且该公司 ARR 已突破 2 亿美元 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/ThvJjPZfK1fF9rJJIIXSrg","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/ThvJjPZfK1fF9rJJIIXSrg"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"今日未检索到可推送的 paper。"}]]}
